main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'ingreso de aire en alimentacion a traves de junta PVC nueva' matches aire+fuga anchors

key_signals.justification: C2: 6 signals (borboteo, balance 92%, dP bajos, cond 510->380, P alta, 18h)

alternatives.justification: C3: 3 alts (O-ring, cavitacion bomba, valvulas drenaje) discriminadas

recommended_action.justification: C4: aislar + verificar valvulas + inspeccionar junta + venteo + ramp extendida - matches

requested_data.justification: C5: 3 anchors (presion succion + junta + balance + monitoreo)

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: explicit: succion normal + sin aire + un vaso con cond alta -> O-ring
